title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on  State Administration and Regulatory Oversight to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to Massachusetts time zones and sunshine protection.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, December 11, 2025 --  The committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2157) of John F. Keenan and Rebecca L. Rausch for legislation relative to Massachusetts time zones and sunshine protection, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 2850).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
